name: standard-nginx-error
description: Parses standard NGINX error logs, including NGINX Proxy Manager

test_samples.description: open() failed error line: log level captured and service set
test_samples.input: 2024/01/15 12:00:00 [error] 1234#0: *5 open() "/usr/share/nginx/html/missing" failed (2: No such file or directory), client: 203.0.113.5, server: example.com, request: "GET /missing HTTP/1.1"

test_samples.description: NGINX error line: log level captured, message retained, service set
test_samples.input: 2024/01/15 12:00:00 [warn] 99#99: *123 a client request body is buffered to a temporary file /var/lib/nginx/body/0000000001

metadata.author: siembox
metadata.log_source: NGINX error log, incl. NGINX Proxy Manager
